auth.label: SCIM Bearer Token
auth.description: Keeper SCIM bearer token sent in the Authorization header. Generate it on the SCIM provisioning setup page in the Keeper Admin Console: https://docs.keeper.io/enterprise-guide/user-and-team-provisioning/automated-provisioning-with-scim/using-scim-api-provisioning

extraFields.label: Node ID
extraFields.description: Keeper enterprise node ID used in the SCIM URL. Find it on the SCIM setup page in the Keeper Admin Console, or with Keeper Commander enterprise-info --nodes.

extraFields.label: Data Center
extraFields.description: Keeper data center for the tenant. Use us, eu, au, jp, ca, or gov as documented by Keeper for SCIM API provisioning.

actions.name: get_group
actions.description: Get one Keeper SCIM group by ID.

id.description: Keeper SCIM resource ID returned by the Users or Groups endpoint.

items.description: One SCIM attribute name to exclude, such as members.

excludedAttributes.description: SCIM attributes to exclude, sent as a comma-separated list. Keeper documents this for the members attribute on group queries.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Keeper SCIM group.

id.description: Keeper team ID returned by SCIM.

displayName.description: Display name of the Keeper team.

externalId.description: Provisioning client identifier for the group.

meta.description: SCIM metadata returned for the group.

group.description: Keeper SCIM group resource. Keeper represents groups as teams.

actions.name: get_service_provider_config
actions.description: Get the Keeper SCIM service provider configuration for the connected node.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this Keeper SCIM request.

config.description: ServiceProviderConfig object returned by Keeper SCIM.

outputSchema.description: Keeper SCIM service provider configuration response.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get one Keeper SCIM user by ID.

id.description: Keeper SCIM resource ID returned by the Users or Groups endpoint.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Keeper SCIM user.

userName.description: SCIM username, usually the user's email address.

displayName.description: Display name returned for the user.

active.description: Whether the user is active in Keeper.

externalId.description: Provisioning client identifier for the user.

emails.description: Email entries returned for the user.

groups.description: Group memberships returned for the user.

meta.description: SCIM metadata returned for the user.

actions.name: list_groups
actions.description: List Keeper SCIM groups with optional pagination and excluded member attributes.

startIndex.description: One-based index of the first SCIM result to return.

count.description: Maximum number of SCIM resources to return.

items.description: One SCIM attribute name to exclude, such as members.

excludedAttributes.description: SCIM attributes to exclude, sent as a comma-separated list. Keeper documents this for the members attribute on group queries.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Keeper SCIM groups.

id.description: Keeper team ID returned by SCIM.

displayName.description: Display name of the Keeper team.

externalId.description: Provisioning client identifier for the group.

meta.description: SCIM metadata returned for the group.

items.description: Keeper SCIM group resource. Keeper represents groups as teams.

totalResults.description: Total matching SCIM resources across all pages.

startIndex.description: One-based index of the first SCIM result to return.

itemsPerPage.description: Number of resources returned in this page.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URIs returned for the list response.

outputSchema.description: A page of Keeper SCIM groups.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Keeper SCIM users with optional SCIM filter and pagination.

startIndex.description: One-based index of the first SCIM result to return.

count.description: Maximum number of SCIM resources to return.

filter.description: SCIM user filter, such as id eq "user_id".

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Keeper SCIM users.

userName.description: SCIM username, usually the user's email address.

displayName.description: Display name returned for the user.

active.description: Whether the user is active in Keeper.

externalId.description: Provisioning client identifier for the user.

emails.description: Email entries returned for the user.

groups.description: Group memberships returned for the user.

meta.description: SCIM metadata returned for the user.

totalResults.description: Total matching SCIM resources across all pages.

startIndex.description: One-based index of the first SCIM result to return.

itemsPerPage.description: Number of resources returned in this page.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URIs returned for the list response.

outputSchema.description: A page of Keeper SCIM users.
